content: O, abazatan ko diho kokuamaon nu? Nookuo tu' au' kanu dii? Kivaa tinimungan susumokodung montok diho'. Pinungaanan do tuhun SONGOVIAN, om mogisoosoomo izioho' doiho' id poginuman.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by LeeSooHa (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: eng:“Oh, you hate your job﹖ Why didn't you say so﹖ There's a support group for that. It's called EVERYBODY, and they meet at the bar.”
